mapper.select: /* oms-order-serviceOrder-sql-oracle.xml - selectServiceOrderDetailList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , MC.CTNM , A.ORDERISTDAY , A.CNFRMDAY , A.ORGORDERKEY , A.CLAIMNO , CASE WHEN A.RIRSNCD = '16' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS NOTRTNDIV , A.RIRSNCD , A.WKSTATUS , (SELECT MIN(DLVRYCORP) FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_WBLNO X WHERE X.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = A.SOHDKEY) AS DLVRYCORP , ( SELECT (CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT X.WBLNO) > 1 THEN MIN(X.WBLNO) || ' 외 ' || (COUNT(DISTINCT X.WBLNO) - 1) || '건' ELSE MIN(X.WBLNO) END) AS WBLNO FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_WBLNO X WHERE X.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = A.SOHDKEY ) AS WBLNO , SD.ICKEY , MI.ICNM , SD.OLNICKEY , MA.ASRTNM , SD.EXPCTQTY , SD.CNFRMQTY , COALESCE((SD.EXPCTQTY - SD.CNFRMQTY), 0) AS IMPSQTY , SD.CNFRMQTY AS IBQTY , SD.CNFRMQTY AS NORMALQTY , SD.CNFRMQTY AS DMGQTY , SD.CNFRMQTY AS DFCQTY , SD.CNFRMQTY AS DONAQTY , IH.HOLDRSNCD , IH.HOLDPRCSDTCONT , A.CMT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TORDER_INFO_IMG X WHERE X.OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND X.COHDKEY = SD.COHDKEY) AS IMGCNT , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY , A.OWKEY , MO.OWNM , A.SOHDKEY , SD.COHDKEY , SD.CODTKEY , A.ORDERTYPECD , A.CTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD A INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON A.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND A.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_IC MI ON SD.OWKEY = MI.OWKEY AND SD.ICKEY = MI.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ASRT MA ON SD.OWKEY = MA.OWKEY AND SD.ICKEY = MA.ASRTREPKEY AND SD.OLNICKEY = MA.ASRTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_OW MO ON A.OWKEY = MO.OWKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT MC ON A.CTKEY = MC.CTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_HOLD IH ON A.OWKEY = IH.OWKEY AND A.COHDKEY = IH.COHDKEY AND A.CLAIMNO = IH.CLAIMNO AND SD.CODTKEY = IH.CODTKEY WHERE A.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey}

/* serviceOrderCommon-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemCodeUnitType */ SELECT A.ICUNITTYPE AS FIELD1 , B.ADCDDTNM AS FIELD2 , A.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD3 , COALESCE(MU.LENGTH, A.LENGTH) AS FIELD4 , COALESCE(MU.WIDTH, A.WIDTH) AS FIELD5 , COALESCE(MU.HEIGHT, A.HEIGHT) AS FIELD6 , COALESCE(MU.WEIGHT, A.WEIGHT)/1000 AS FIELD7 , COALESCE(MU.VOL, A.VOL)/1000 AS FIELD8 , A.ICUNITQTY AS FIELD9 FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE A LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICMEASUREMENT MU ON A.OWKEY = MU.OWKEY AND A.ICUNITKEY = MU.ICUNITKEY AND A.ICUNITTYPE= MU.ICUNITTYPE AND MU.CTKEY = #{ctkey} LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT B.ADCDDTKEY , B.ADCDDTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_HD A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT B ON A.ADCDHDKEY = B.ADCDHDKEY AND A.ADCDHDKEY ='ICUTTYPE' AND B.LAKEY = #{slakey} ) B ON A.ICUNITTYPE = B.ADCDDTKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICUNITKEY = #{icutkey}
